extortion.description: Fortiss, LLC started in 2005, as a provider of accounting and management consulting services that cater to the needs of casinos and card rooms throughout California. Offering a wide range of customized business solutions for the gaming industry, Fortiss provides services from recruiting and training programs to specialized accounting and human resources consulting. The goal at Fortiss is to help clients identify ways to streamline their casino or card club operation, and leverage new industry opportunities while maximizing profitability. fortiss.com
